# ManyAITool / Doraemon Toolbox
> An AI + Web3 product-factory toolbox by Doraemon: practical web products for prediction markets, perpetual DEX research, US stocks, AI agents, and everyday browser utilities.
> The canonical site is https://manyaitool.com . Tools are free to open. Market-related tools organize public data and are not financial advice.

## What this site is
- Doraemon Toolbox is a public workshop of small, focused web apps.
- Core themes: AI tools, Web3 tools, Polymarket/Kalshi prediction markets, Hyperliquid and perpetual DEX research, US stock research, and browser utilities.
- The product-factory strategy: each narrow product gets its own searchable page, solves one concrete workflow, and links back into the wider toolbox.

## Primary product catalog
- [Product catalog](https://manyaitool.com/#products): Browse all published products by category.
- [ProofRank — Hyperliquid Vault Check](https://manyaitool.com/products/proofrank): Check Hyperliquid vaults before copying them: real APR, drawdown, recent PnL and plain-language risk verdicts.
- [PolyBall — Football Markets](https://manyaitool.com/products/polyball): Polymarket football-market research with whale moves and match data.
- [PolyWeather](https://manyaitool.com/products/polyweather): Weather-model ensemble forecasts for Polymarket weather markets.
- [PolyMix](https://manyaitool.com/products/polymix): NBA prediction-market odds comparison across Polymarket, Kalshi and major books.
- [PolyWhale](https://manyaitool.com/products/polywhale): Whale detection across Polymarket and Kalshi.
- [PerpOIRadar](https://manyaitool.com/products/perpoiradar): Open-interest radar for perpetual futures.
- [PerpFunding](https://manyaitool.com/products/perpfunding): Cross-exchange funding-rate radar.
- [HyperSmart](https://manyaitool.com/products/hypersmart): Historical copy-trading research before following a trader.
- [13F Tracker](https://manyaitool.com/products/13f): US stock 13F and guru-holdings research.
- [Congress Trading](https://manyaitool.com/products/congress): Congressional stock-trading watch tool.

## Developer Tools
- [JSON Formatter](https://manyaitool.com/tools/json-formatter): Format, minify, and validate JSON data instantly
- [JWT Decoder](https://manyaitool.com/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode JWT tokens, inspect header/payload, check expiration
- [Base64 Encoder](https://manyaitool.com/tools/base64-encoder): Encode and decode Base64 with Unicode support
- [Timestamp Converter](https://manyaitool.com/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert Unix epoch timestamps to dates and back

## Converters
- [Markdown to HTML](https://manyaitool.com/tools/markdown-to-html): Convert Markdown to HTML with live preview
- [SVG to PNG](https://manyaitool.com/tools/svg-to-png): Convert SVG to PNG with custom scale (1-4x) and background
- [Image to Base64](https://manyaitool.com/tools/image-to-base64): Encode images to Base64, data URI, HTML img tag, CSS background

## Calculators
- [AI Token Calculator](https://manyaitool.com/tools/ai-token-calculator): Count tokens and estimate costs for 20+ AI models including GPT-4, Claude, Gemini

## Text Tools
- [Word Counter](https://manyaitool.com/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time

## Design Tools
- [Color Picker](https://manyaitool.com/tools/color-picker): Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats

## Generators
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://manyaitool.com/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator): Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words

## Calendars & Time
- [Moon Phase Calendar](https://manyaitool.com/tools/moon-phase-calendar): See tonight's moon phase, illumination %, and a live countdown to the next full moon, new moon, supermoon & blue moon. Includes the 2026 full moon calendar and .ics export.
- [National Days Calendar](https://manyaitool.com/tools/national-days-calendar): Find out what national day is today and what's coming up — National Donut Day, Coffee Day, Pizza Day and more, with exact dates, countdowns, and .ics export.

## Full Moon 2026 (per-month & event pages)
- [Full Moon 2026 hub](https://manyaitool.com/full-moon): All 13 full moons of 2026 with dates, names, supermoons and the blue moon.
- [Full Moon Calendar 2026](https://manyaitool.com/full-moon/calendar-2026): Complete table of every 2026 full moon date, time and name.
- [Blue Moon 2026](https://manyaitool.com/full-moon/blue-moon-2026): The only blue moon of 2026 is May 31 (also a micromoon).
- [Supermoon 2026](https://manyaitool.com/full-moon/supermoon-2026): Three supermoons in 2026 — Jan 3, Nov 24, Dec 23.
- Per-month pages: https://manyaitool.com/full-moon/{january..december}-2026

## National Days (per-day pages)
- [National Days Calendar 2026 hub](https://manyaitool.com/national-days): Browse every National Day with exact 2026 dates.
- Per-day pages, e.g. https://manyaitool.com/national-days/donut-day , /coffee-day , /pizza-day , /taco-day — each with the date for 2026-2028, countdown and .ics.
